---
format: html
---

## About Me

<!-- Raw HTML Block for the Userbox -->
```{r, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
angel.png <- knitr::include_graphics("angel.png")
cat('
<style>
.userbox {
  display: flex;
  width: 238px;
  height: 45px;
  border: 1px solid #6e5084;
  background-color: #f7f1fc;
  font-family: sans-serif;
  font-size: 8pt;
  color: #226663;
  margin: 5px;
}

.ubx-id {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 45px;
  background-color: #ece1f5;
  border-right: 1px solid #6e5084;
}

.ubx-id img {
  width: 32px;
  height: 32px;
  object-fit: contain;
  display: block;
}

.ubx-info {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  color: #226663;
  padding: 0 6px;
  flex-grow: 1;
  color: #226663;
}
</style>

<div class="userbox">
  <div class="ubx-id">
    <img src="angel.png" alt="Angel icon">
  </div>
  <div class="ubx-info">This user is being guided to heaven.</div>
</div>
')
```

<!-- Raw HTML Block for the Userbox -->
```{r, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
cat('
<style>
.userbox {
  display: flex;
  width: 238px;
  height: 45px;
  border: 1px solid #6e5084;
  background-color: #f7f1fc;
  font-family: sans-serif;
  font-size: 8pt;
  color: #000000;
  margin: 5px;
}
.ubx-id {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 45px;
  background-color: #ece1f5;
  font-size: 14pt;
  font-weight: bold;
  border-right: 1px solid #6e5084;
}
.ubx-info {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  background-color: #226663;
  padding: 0 6px;
  flex-grow: 1;
}
</style>

<div class="userbox">
  <div class="ubx-id">R</div>
  <div class="ubx-info">This user is guided by the stars above.</div>
</div>
')
```


<!-- Raw HTML Block for the Userbox -->
```{r, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
cat('
<style>
.userbox {
  display: flex;
  width: 238px;
  height: 45px;
  border: 1px solid #999999;
  background-color: #f8f9fa;
  font-family: sans-serif;
  font-size: 8pt;
  color: #000000;
  margin: 5px;
}
.ubx-id {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 45px;
  background-color: #dddddd;
  font-size: 14pt;
  font-weight: bold;
  border-right: 1px solid #999999;
}
.ubx-info {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 0 6px;
  flex-grow: 1;
}
</style>

<div class="userbox">
  <div class="ubx-id">R</div>
  <div class="ubx-info">This user is being guided to heaven.</div>
</div>
')
```
